plan.title: Wire + flip the render family (spec:validate, spec:render, prd:render, project:render)

narratives.Description: The spec/PRD/project render and spec validate gates have parity-proven TS core modules (packages/core/src/render/spec-validate.ts, spec-render.ts, prd-render.ts, project-render.ts) but no dispatcher verb, so tasks/spec.yml, tasks/prd.yml, and tasks/project.yml still shell Python. This story exposes each module as a dispatcher verb and repoints the three owned Taskfiles. It is independently buildable: it owns those three Taskfiles exclusively and adds isolated case blocks to the dispatch switch.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Add `spec-validate`, `spec-render`, `prd-render`, `project-render` cases (plus colon aliases where the task uses them) to packages/cli/src/dispatch.ts, each delegating to the existing core/render module via a thin CLI wrapper under packages/cli/src/render-cli/. 2. Repoint tasks/spec.yml, tasks/prd.yml, tasks/project.yml cmds from `uv run python scripts/{spec_validate,spec_render,prd_render,project_render}.py` to the new `node .../bin.js <verb>` forms, preserving argument order/paths. 3. Run task ts:render-parity to confirm byte-identical output and add a CHANGELOG entry.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft maintainer, I want spec/PRD/project rendering to run through the TS dispatcher, so that the render Python scripts become unreferenced ahead of the #1731 delete.

items.title: Given the dispatcher, when `node .../bin.js spec-render <spec> <out>` runs, then it produces a SPECIFICATION.md byte-identical to the Python spec_render.py output (asserted by ts:render-parity remaining CLEAN).

narrative.Acceptance: Given the dispatcher, when `node .../bin.js spec-render <spec> <out>` runs, then it produces a SPECIFICATION.md byte-identical to the Python spec_render.py output (asserted by ts:render-parity remaining CLEAN).

items.title: Given `task spec:validate`, `task prd:render`, and `task project:render`, when each runs, then it invokes the new bin.js verb and not `uv run python`.

narrative.Acceptance: Given `task spec:validate`, `task prd:render`, and `task project:render`, when each runs, then it invokes the new bin.js verb and not `uv run python`.

items.title: Given `grep -rE 'uv .*run python .*scripts/(spec_validate|spec_render|prd_render|project_render)\.py' tasks/`, when run, then it returns no matches.

narrative.Acceptance: Given `grep -rE 'uv .*run python .*scripts/(spec_validate|spec_render|prd_render|project_render)\.py' tasks/`, when run, then it returns no matches.

references.title: Issue #1854: feat(ts-migration): Wave 8.6 -- finish the partial Python->TS live flip (precondition for #1731 delete)
